name: codexminimal
description: Minimal tool-agnostic harness for intent-driven software delivery, index-first routing, and lightweight workflow evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Intent-driven routing, planning, indexing, and evidence for coding agents
interface.longDescription: CodexMinimal routes non-trivial repository work through a small tool-agnostic harness: task routing, IDSD intent packages, phase planning, project indexing, profile overlays, verification evidence, and feedback learning.
defaultPrompt: Add a feature to this repository using CodexMinimal.
Review this change with CodexMinimal routing.
